name: Dragonborn
summary: Draconic blood given mortal form — scaled, proud, and carrying an ancestor's breath.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.summary: Choose a dragon ancestor; it sets your breath weapon and resistance damage type.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.summary: Replace one attack with a 15-ft cone or 30-ft line exhalation (DEX save, 1d10 of your ancestry's damage, scaling by level). Uses per long rest scale with proficiency.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.summary: Resistance to your ancestry's damage type.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: See in dim light within 60 ft as if bright.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.summary: At level 5, sprout spectral wings for 10 minutes (1/long rest) and gain a fly speed equal to your speed.

name: Dwarf
summary: Stone-born and stubborn, dwarves endure what would break lesser folk.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: See in dim light within 120 ft as if bright.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.summary: Resistance to poison damage; advantage on saves against the poisoned condition.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.summary: +1 hit point per level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.summary: As a bonus action, gain tremorsense 60 ft for 10 minutes while on stone (uses scale with proficiency).

name: Elf
summary: Long-lived and fey-touched, elves walk between the mortal world and older ones.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: See in dim light within 60 ft as if bright.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.summary: Choose a lineage (Drow, High, or Wood); it grants a cantrip and later spells, plus lineage benefits.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.summary: Advantage on saves against the charmed condition.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.summary: Proficiency in Insight, Perception, or Survival.

traits.name: Trance
traits.summary: You don't sleep; a 4-hour trance gives the benefit of a long rest.

name: Gnome
summary: Small, quick-minded and quicker-fingered, gnomes treat the world as a puzzle half-solved.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: See in dim light within 60 ft as if bright.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.summary: Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.summary: Choose Forest (minor illusion + speak with small beasts) or Rock (prestidigitation + tinkering clockwork devices).

name: Goliath
summary: Descendants of giants — tall as doorframes, strong as arguments.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.summary: Choose a giant lineage granting a supernatural boon (e.g. Stone's Endurance: reduce damage by 1d12 + CON as a reaction).

traits.name: Large Form
traits.summary: At level 5, become Large for 10 minutes (1/long rest): advantage on Strength checks, +10 ft speed.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.summary: Advantage on saves against grappled; count as one size larger for carrying.

name: Halfling
summary: Small folk with outsized luck and the good sense to stay out from underfoot.

traits.name: Brave
traits.summary: Advantage on saves against the frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.summary: Move through the space of any larger creature.

traits.name: Luck
traits.summary: Reroll any natural 1 on a d20 test; keep the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.summary: Hide even when obscured only by a larger creature.

name: Human
summary: Everywhere, adaptable, and annoyingly good at everything they set their minds to.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.summary: Gain Heroic Inspiration after each long rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.summary: Proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.summary: An Origin feat of your choice.

name: Orc
summary: Broad-shouldered and relentless, orcs meet the world head-on and rarely blink first.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.summary: Dash as a bonus action and gain temporary hit points equal to your proficiency bonus (uses scale with proficiency).

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: See in dim light within 120 ft as if bright.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.summary: Once per long rest, drop to 1 hit point instead of 0.

name: Tiefling
summary: A fiendish thread in the bloodline — horns, an otherworldly poise, and inherited fire.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: See in dim light within 60 ft as if bright.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.summary: Choose Abyssal, Chthonic, or Infernal: each grants a resistance, a cantrip, and later spells.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.summary: You know the thaumaturgy cantrip.
